description: Repo-only list of tracked upstream contributor sources. Local mapping is derived dynamically from explicit upstream-topic references and rule evidence in this repository; it is not hard-coded in this manifest.

sources.title: AzureRM Provider Contributor Guides
reviewNotes: Use as the root index for contributor topic coverage.
Review when upstream contributor topic membership or contributor workflow framing changes.

sources.title: Building the Provider
reviewNotes: Current upstream entry point for canonical provider build guidance.
Review when upstream build prerequisites or the canonical build handoff move to a different document.

sources.title: Debugging the Provider
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for logging, proxy, and debugger-based provider debugging guidance.

sources.title: Frequently Asked Questions
reviewNotes: Review contributor-facing workflow expectations such as merge-conflict handling, release cadence, label meanings, and issue-routing norms.

sources.title: High Level Overview
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for provider package layout, service package anatomy, and typed-versus-untyped implementation taxonomy.

sources.title: Glossary
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for provider terminology such as service packages, resource ID parser or validator types, and typed-versus-untyped concepts.

sources.title: Running the Tests
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for acceptance-test entry points, required ARM_* environment variables, and targeted test filtering.

sources.title: Opening a PR
reviewNotes: Review PR-process expectations, testing expectations, and contributor-facing submission guidance.

sources.title: Best Practices
reviewNotes: Covers typed-vs-untyped guidance, Optional+Computed conventions, GetRawConfig guidance, and pointer helpers.

sources.title: Schema Design Considerations
reviewNotes: Covers schema-shape choices, Enabled/None patterns, validation expectations, and preview-field rules.

sources.title: Working with Errors
reviewNotes: Covers wrapped-error context, internal-error guidance, and errors.New versus fmt.Errorf guidance.

sources.title: Acceptance Testing
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for required test matrix, ImportStep guidance, PreCheck patterns, and helper struct conventions.

sources.title: Provider Documentation Standards
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for examples, code fences, argument ordering, attribute ordering, and note formatting.

sources.title: Guide: New Resource
reviewNotes: Useful when upstream changes the staged workflow for new resources, including acceptance-test, docs, and PR expectations.

sources.title: Guide: New Data Source
reviewNotes: Useful when upstream changes the staged workflow for new data sources, including testing, docs, and PR expectations.

sources.title: Maintainer Specific: Merging Pull Requests
reviewNotes: Review when upstream changes maintainer-only changelog or merge expectations that affect local maintainer tooling.

sources.title: Guide: ARM API Versions
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for stable-versus-preview ARM API selection, preview-api exception criteria, and preview linter expectations.

sources.title: Guide: Breaking Changes and Deprecations
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for breaking-change handling, FivePointOh feature-flag staging, upgrade-guide expectations, and deprecation cleanup.

sources.title: Guide: List Resource
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for framework list resources, identity prerequisites, flatten reuse, TF 1.14 query tests, and list-resource docs.

sources.title: Guide: Adding a new Feature to the Features Block
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for feature-block changes across internal/features, provider schema, framework config, tests, and resource behavior.

sources.title: Guide: Extending a Data Source
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for extending existing data sources with new computed fields, read-state updates, tests, and docs.

sources.title: Guide: Extending a Resource
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for extending existing resources with schema, CRUD, tests, docs, and default-value breaking-change review.

sources.title: Guide: When to inline new functionality versus a new resource
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for deciding when new functionality belongs inline, as a separate resource, or in both forms.

sources.title: Guide: New Service Package
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for service package scaffolding, registration, client wiring, and generation steps.

sources.title: Guide: Adding a new Write-Only Attribute
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for write-only attribute schema, trigger fields, CRUD helpers, Terraform version gating, tests, and docs.

sources.title: Guide: Resource Identity
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for resource identity schema, SetResourceIdentityData usage, generated tests, and current generator limitations.

sources.title: Guide: Resource IDs
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for resource ID parser and validator precedence across go-azure-sdk, commonids, and legacy generated helpers.

sources.title: Guide: State Migrations
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for migration file conventions, stripped schema copies, ResourceWithStateMigration wiring, and manual migration testing.

sources.title: Property Naming
reviewNotes: Primary upstream source for property naming conventions including resource ID suffixes, boolean naming, unit suffixes, and marketed names.
